CVE-2021-21897.title: A code execution vulnerability exists in the DL_Dxf::handleLWPoly ...
CVE-2021-21897.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the DL_Dxf::handleLWPolylineData functionality of Ribbonsoft dxflib 3.17.0. A specially-crafted .dxf file can lead to a heap buffer overflow. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2023-30259.title: A Buffer Overflow vulnerability in importshp plugin in LibreCAD 2 ...
CVE-2023-30259.description: A Buffer Overflow vulnerability in importshp plugin in LibreCAD 2.2.0 allows attackers to obtain sensitive information via a crafted DBF file.
